query: WITH appointment_rows AS (SELECT a.id, a.contact_id, a.location_id, a.agent_id, a.lead_id, a.ghl_event_id, a.calendar_id, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.status, a.booked_via, a.created_at, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leads l WHERE l.id = a.lead_id) AS lead_id_exists, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leads l WHERE l.contact_id = a.contact_id AND l.location_id = a.location_id) AS contact_location_lead_exists, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM agents ag WHERE ag.id = a.agent_id) AS agent_id_exists, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM agents ag WHERE ag.location_id = a.location_id) AS location_agent_exists FROM appointments a ORDER BY a.created_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50), context_booked AS (SELECT cc.id, cc.contact_id, cc.location_id, cc.appointment_booked, cc.appointment_pending_slot, cc.last_interaction, cc.updated_at, cc.conversation_summary, COUNT(a.id) AS appointment_rows FROM conversation_context cc LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.contact_id = cc.contact_id AND COALESCE(a.location_id,'') = COALESCE(cc.location_id,'') WHERE cc.appointment_booked IS TRUE GROUP BY cc.id, cc.contact_id, cc.location_id, cc.appointment_booked, cc.appointment_pending_slot, cc.last_interaction, cc.updated_at, cc.conversation_summary ORDER BY cc.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50), recent_appt_language AS (SELECT id, contact_id, location_id, direction, timestamp, ai_intent, intent_detected, LEFT(message_body, 500) AS message_excerpt FROM message_log WHERE message_body ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%appointment%','%book%','%calendar%','%meeting%','%scheduled%','%tour%','%showing%']) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50), inbound_appt_language AS (SELECT id, captured_at, contact_id, location_id, processed, ghl_message_id, LEFT(payload::text, 700) AS payload_excerpt FROM inbound_capture WHERE payload::text ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%appointment%','%calendar%','%book%','%scheduled%','%meeting%','%showing%']) ORDER BY captured_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50), orphan_context AS (SELECT cc.id, cc.contact_id, cc.location_id, cc.updated_at FROM conversation_context cc LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = cc.contact_id AND l.location_id = cc.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL ORDER BY cc.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50), orphan_messages AS (SELECT ml.id, ml.contact_id, ml.location_id, ml.timestamp, ml.direction, ml.ai_intent FROM message_log ml LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = ml.contact_id AND l.location_id = ml.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL ORDER BY ml.timestamp DESC LIMIT 50), agent_state AS (SELECT id, location_id, agent_name, business_name, active, use_custom_personality, personality_prompt IS NOT NULL AND length(personality_prompt) > 0 AS has_personality_prompt, agent_notes IS NOT NULL AND length(agent_notes) > 0 AS has_agent_notes, calendar_id IS NOT NULL AND length(calendar_id) > 0 AS has_calendar_id, calendar_link IS NOT NULL AND length(calendar_link) > 0 AS has_calendar_link, ghl_user_id IS NOT NULL AND length(ghl_user_id) > 0 AS has_ghl_user_id, created_at, updated_at FROM agents ORDER BY created_at DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT jsonb_build_object('audit_generated_at', now(), 'counts', jsonb_build_object('agents', (SELECT count(*) FROM agents), 'active_agents', (SELECT count(*) FROM agents WHERE active IS TRUE), 'leads', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads), 'conversation_context', (SELECT count(*) FROM conversation_context), 'message_log', (SELECT count(*) FROM message_log), 'inbound_capture', (SELECT count(*) FROM inbound_capture), 'appointments', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments)), 'appointment_health', jsonb_build_object('total', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments), 'null_lead_id', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments WHERE lead_id IS NULL), 'null_agent_id', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments WHERE agent_id IS NULL), 'null_location_id', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments WHERE location_id IS NULL), 'missing_lead_by_id', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.id = a.lead_id WHERE a.lead_id IS NOT NULL AND l.id IS NULL), 'missing_lead_by_contact_location', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = a.contact_id AND l.location_id = a.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL), 'missing_agent_by_id', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN agents ag ON ag.id = a.agent_id WHERE a.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ag.id IS NULL), 'missing_agent_by_location', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN agents ag ON ag.location_id = a.location_id WHERE ag.id IS NULL), 'by_status', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_object_agg(status, ct) FROM (SELECT COALESCE(status,'null') status, count(*) ct FROM appointments GROUP BY 1) s), '{}'::jsonb)), 'recent_appointments', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(appointment_rows)) FROM appointment_rows), '[]'::jsonb), 'contexts_booked', jsonb_build_object('total_contexts_booked_true', (SELECT count(*) FROM conversation_context WHERE appointment_booked IS TRUE), 'booked_contexts_without_appointment_row', (SELECT count(*) FROM context_booked WHERE appointment_rows = 0), 'sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(context_booked)) FROM context_booked), '[]'::jsonb)), 'appointment_language_in_message_log', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_appt_language)) FROM recent_appt_language), '[]'::jsonb), 'appointment_language_in_inbound_capture', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inbound_appt_language)) FROM inbound_appt_language), '[]'::jsonb), 'orphan_summary', jsonb_build_object('conversation_context_without_lead', (SELECT count(*) FROM conversation_context cc LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = cc.contact_id AND l.location_id = cc.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL), 'message_log_without_lead', (SELECT count(*) FROM message_log ml LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = ml.contact_id AND l.location_id = ml.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL), 'inbound_capture_unprocessed', (SELECT count(*) FROM inbound_capture WHERE processed IS NOT TRUE), 'context_sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(orphan_context)) FROM orphan_context), '[]'::jsonb), 'message_sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(orphan_messages)) FROM orphan_messages), '[]'::jsonb)), 'agent_state', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(agent_state)) FROM agent_state), '[]'::jsonb)) AS gap_audit;
